title: Triumph (Acclamator-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Acclamator''-class}}
{{Youmay|the Republic assault ship|the [[Triumph (Marauder-class)|corvette]]}}
[[File:Triumph_and_Doneeta.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Triumph'' and ''[[Doneeta]]'' attack [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] starships during the [[Battle of Rendili]]]]

The '''''Triumph''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It fought at the [[Battle of Rendili]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. Later, it served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]]
*[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]]
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
